title: [FIRRTL][LowerXMR] Use ABI for refs when no internal path info.
body:
Ref-type ports on external modules should resolve to uses of the ABI macros when the path information isn't present (e.g., `ref is "a.b.c"` statements.

Note that the "circuit" name for an external module is expected (must) be the same as its module name.  Without a mechanism to mark the circuit an extmodule appears under, we assume its in a circuit of that name.

These macros are used with expectation the tool/user will ensure the right ABI files are included.

cc #5218 , test is based on example there.
